SEARCH
Package client.view

Class ApprovalQueueController

java.lang.Object
client.view.BaseController
client.view.ApprovalQueueController
public class ApprovalQueueController extends BaseController
Approval-queue screen, visible to a DEPT_MANAGER only (gated in MainShellController). On show it loads every PENDING parameter-change request via LIST_PENDING_CHANGES and lists them in a table: park name, field, old → new, and who requested it.

Each row offers Approve / Reject, which send APPROVE_PARAM_CHANGE / REJECT_PARAM_CHANGE; on success the list is reloaded so the decided request drops out of the queue. Refresh is manual (on open, after a decision, or via the Refresh button) — realtime push for this screen is a later session.

Extends BaseController for navigation-lifecycle parity; it holds no push subscriptions.

      Loads the pending queue from the server and repaints the table.

      private void populate(List<ParameterChangeRequestDTO> rows)
      Renders the header and one row per pending request (or an empty-state row).
      Parameters:
      rows - the pending requests to display

      Returns the table header row of column titles.

    • dataRow

      private HBox dataRow(ParameterChangeRequestDTO r, boolean withDivider)
      Builds one request row: details plus Approve/Reject buttons.
      Parameters:
      r - the pending request to render
      withDivider - whether to draw a divider below the row
      Returns:
      the assembled row

    • decide

      private void decide(int requestId, boolean approve)
      Approves or rejects a request, then reloads the queue on success.
      Parameters:
      requestId - the request to decide
      approve - true to approve, false to reject

      private Label headerCell(String text, double w)
      Builds a fixed-width column header cell.

      private static String labelFor(ParamField field)
      Friendly label for a parameter field, e.g. MAX_CAPACITY → "Max Capacity".

      Returns:
      a human-friendly label for the field
